title: Mast-o-Khiar (Yogurt & Cucumber Dip)
description: A cool and creamy Persian dip combining thick yogurt with grated cucumbers, crunchy walnuts, sweet raisins, and fragrant dried mint.

instructions.text: Wash the Persian cucumbers. Grate them or chop them very finely. If grating, gently squeeze out excess water.
In a serving bowl, combine the plain yogurt, prepared cucumbers, minced garlic, dried mint, chopped walnuts, and raisins.
Season with salt to taste and stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Garnish the top with a sprinkle of crushed dried rose petals, extra walnuts, and mint. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.

tips: For a thicker dip, use strained yogurt (Mast-e Kiseh) or Greek yogurt. Let the flavors marry in the fridge for an hour before eating.
storage_notes: Store in the refrigerator for up to 3 days. It may become a bit watery; simply stir it before serving.
serve_with: Flatbread (Lavash or Sangak), crackers, or as a cooling side to spicy or rich dishes like Adas Polo.

substitutions.note: Cut in half and scoop out the watery seeds before grating.
Use 2 tablespoons of finely chopped fresh mint instead.
